overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective pavement, futuristic architecture, and light pedestrian traffic. The scene transitions from a covered walkway to open intersections beneath elevated highways, with fireworks visible in the sky above towering mega-buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon vending machines

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with elevated highway visible ahead
futuristic black sedan drives past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a neon-lit covered walkway toward an open intersection

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: row of glowing green and blue automated vending machines lining the right wall
overhead concrete structure providing partial shelter from rain
red and green illuminated signage on building facades
rain-slicked ground reflecting colorful neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a semi-covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by vibrant neon signs and vending machines. The camera moves forward through the wet concrete corridor, passing green and red illuminated storefronts before emerging toward an open intersection where a futuristic car drives past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection beneath elevated highway with neon underlighting

events.description: steps onto the wide yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the intersection
fireworks become visible in the sky above the distant mega-building

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on a striped crosswalk, moving beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure holding an umbrella crossing in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with glowing green neon strips running underneath
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black stripes
tall building facade covered with large illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide urban intersection beneath an elevated highway structure illuminated by green neon strips. The yellow-striped crosswalk leads toward a massive arcology building in the distance, while fireworks begin to appear in the night sky above. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in opposing directions across the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with mega-building and fireworks display overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering building and fireworks display in the sky
camera returns to level position showing crosswalk with red WAIT signal

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering arcology and fireworks, then preparing to cross at the WAIT signal

entered.detail: massive tiered skyscraper with red and blue neon lighting on structural support columns
purple and pink fireworks exploding in the night sky above the city
large floating digital screen mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a spectacular view of a massive arcology tower with changing neon lights and fireworks exploding in the sky. After observing the display, the view returns to street level where the crosswalk shows a red WAIT signal projected on the wet ground, with the mega-building now dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital advertisements

events.description: crosswalk signal changes from red WAIT to green WALK with directional arrows
futuristic purple car drives across the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians with umbrellas, then continuing along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person carrying an umbrella walking alongside the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead concrete shelter with red neon edge lighting providing cover from rain
tall illuminated advertisement screens mounted on building walls displaying various content
ground-projected green WALK text and arrows on the yellow crosswalk stripes

segments.scene_description: The crosswalk signal changes to green WALK, and the camera crosses the street alongside pedestrians with umbrellas. A futuristic purple car drives past on the crosswalk. The scene transitions to a covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, lined with vertical digital billboards and bathed in red and blue neon light reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a sprawling urban intersection dominated by a massive arcology tower. It begins within a semi-covered walkway of vibrant vending machines and storefronts, moving forward across wet concrete before emerging into an open intersection as a futuristic car glides past. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped pavement beneath a green-lit elevated highway, the view tilts upward to reveal fireworks exploding around a towering mega-building with shifting neon lights. The perspective then returns to street level, pausing at a red projected wait signal before advancing with umbrella-carrying pedestrians as a purple car passes by. Finally, the movement leads back under the highway structure, where the environment shifts into a covered sidewalk lined with vertical digital billboards reflecting red and blue light off the damp ground.
